queries.query:
from(bucket: "dali_devices")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "dali_property" and r.title == v.joce_device_title and r.title!="Unknown")
  |> group(columns: ["device_guid", "title", "property"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["property"] == "driverInputPower")
  |> keep(columns: ["device_guid", "title", "property", "_value", "unit", "_time"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "dali_devices")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> group(columns: ["title","property","unit"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["title", "property","unit","device_guid","_value"])

from(bucket: "dali_devices")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "dali_property" and r.title == v.joce_device_title and r.title!="Unknown")
  |> group(columns: ["device_guid", "title", "property"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["property"] == "driverInputVoltage")
  |> keep(columns: ["device_guid", "title", "property", "_value", "unit", "_time"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "dali_devices")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "dali_property" and r.title == v.joce_device_title and r.title!="Unknown")
  |> group(columns: ["device_guid", "title", "property"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["property"] == "driverTemperature")
  |> keep(columns: ["device_guid", "title", "property", "_value", "unit", "_time"])
  |> last()
